purpose: Refresh strict body-contact runtime acceptance for Main Flow current hash after 181500 local pose/depth revalidation; classify remaining blockers with authoritative runtime evidence.
commands_or_endpoints: Acquire EC2 lease if approved and run live validation on current workflow hash.
Validate graph node reference resolution for strict body-contact nodes; explicitly fail/mark if any required node reference errors exist.
Capture runtime evidence for per-hand nodes 1051-1054 (left/right split), node 1009 actor-body behavior, and contact edge gating behavior.
Capture output/preview evidence for strict-body mask nodes 1032, 1059-1062, 1067-1070, and 1078/1083/1088/1093 if edge QA runs.
Collect visibility/proxy checks for strict hand dependencies (hand YOLO, SAM, OpenPose/CN stack) as runtime context evidence.

required_checks.name: current_hash_graph_load
required_checks.pass_condition: Workflow loads under current hash with no missing LoadImage / LoadImageMask / ControlNet / endpoint blocking on the strict body-contact branch.

required_checks.name: placeholder_as_intent_not_error
required_checks.pass_condition: Nodes 1051-1054 resolve to exact-name files and runtime reports these as intentional zero/off if they remain placeholders.

required_checks.name: actor_body_zero_semantics
required_checks.pass_condition: Node 1009 is accepted as zero/off for actor_hand_only_contact_v1 without forcing graph failure; if rejected, capture exact blocker and whether fallback bypass is possible without editing Main Flow.

required_checks.name: runtime_visibility
required_checks.pass_condition: Runtime evidence includes strict contact outputs and confirms strict_hand_detail_input source presence plus required model/tool availability context.

expected_outputs: Lane 4 runtime evidence package with exact pass/fail per required check and evidence file paths/hashes.
Lane 4 classification of blockers: which are runtime-true vs still-semantic (same-scene per-hand split or actor-body mask source missing).
EC2 stop state + lease release evidence for the completed run.

runtime_constraints.no_evidence_promotion: Do not promote final acceptance; this is still Lane 5 + visual review dependent.

next_action: Lane 5 strict visual hand/contact review should run after runtime package is delivered; no Main Flow semantic edits by Lane 2 during this stage.
